import.title: Import statement
import.subtitle: Upload a credit-card statement PDF and review the expenses before importing them.
import.parseMessage: We couldn't read this statement automatically — you can still add expenses manually.
import.unsupportedMessage: This bank isn't supported yet — you can still add expenses manually.
import.importError: We couldn't import these expenses. Please try again.

picker.title: Upload a statement PDF
picker.description: We'll read the expenses so you can review and import them in one go.

done.withMerges: They've been added to your transactions; matched charges were merged into the ones you already had.
done.noMerges: They've been added to your transactions.

review.duplicate: Looks like you already imported this statement. You can still import it if this is intentional.
review.dateNote: Lines are dated when the card is paid; the original purchase date is shown per row.

account.title: Card account
account.subtitle: We matched these charges to your card. Confirm or pick another.
account.noMatch: No {{currency}} card account — these lines import without one.

registerCard.title: Register this card
registerCard.subtitle: We read this card from the statement. Confirm the details and we'll add it with its accounts.

last4.label: Last 4 digits
last4.error: Enter the 4 digits, or leave this blank.

registerCard.accountsSubheading: One per currency in this statement. Edit the opening balance if you know it.
registerCard.error: We couldn't register this card. Check your connection and try again.

plan.title: Payment plan
plan.subtitle: Whether your accounts cover this statement, per currency.
plan.residual: Still short by {{amount}} after all your {{currency}} accounts.
plan.noAccounts: No {{currency}} account to pay from — add one to plan this.
plan.scheduledDetail: Your top-up transfers are scheduled for the due date. They stay pending until then.
plan.scheduleError: We couldn't schedule these transfers. Please try again.
plan.scheduleHint: Move the funds now as transfers dated for the due date — they stay pending until then.

line.keepBothAriaLabel: Keep both — import {{name}} as a separate expense
